## Checklist

- [ ] I linked the related issue with `Closes #...` or `Fixes #...` when applicable.
- [ ] I reviewed the testing standards in `CONTRIBUTING.md` and ran the relevant checks for this change.
- [ ] I ran lint and formatting checks locally when they apply, or I explained why they were skipped.
- [ ] I updated documentation or comments for any user-facing change, or this change does not require docs.
- [ ] I reviewed the commit conventions in `CONTRIBUTING.md` and used the expected format for my commits and PR title.
- [ ] I kept this PR focused on a single logical change, or I explained why broader scope was necessary.
